questionText: Does your organization prioritize which suppliers to engage with on environmental issues?
questionKo: 귀사는 환경이슈와 관련하여 인게이지먼트 할 공급업체의 우선순위를 정하여 관리하고 있습니까 ?
issueTags: Water, Ocean, Plastics, Climate Change, Forests
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This question allows data users to understand whether an organization prioritizes specific suppliers for engagement on environmental issues and, if so, the criteria employed in this prioritization to ensure that engagement achieves the greatest benefits.

columns.text: Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue
options: Yes, we prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue
No, we do not prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue
optionsKo: 예, 당사 공급업체 와/과 이 환경 이슈
, 당사 아님 공급업체 와/과 이 환경 이슈

columns.text: Criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized for engagement on this environmental issue
options: In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to climate change
In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to forests
In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to water
In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to the ocean
In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to plastics
Suppliers' exposure or vulnerability to physical risks
columns.textKo: 기준 공급업체 에 대한 이 환경 이슈
optionsKo: 라인 와/과 기준 사용된 공급업체 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 기후변화
라인 와/과 기준 사용된 공급업체 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 산림
라인 와/과 기준 사용된 공급업체 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 수자원
라인 와/과 기준 사용된 공급업체 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 해양
라인 와/과 기준 사용된 공급업체 의존성 및/또는 영향s 관련된 플라스틱

columns.text: Primary reason for no supplier prioritization on this environmental issue
options: Lack of internal resources, capabilities or expertise (e.g., due to organization size)
Judged to be unimportant or not relevant
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 에 대한 공급업체 이 환경 이슈

guidance.text: No change; New question for Ocean
This question appears if you select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the row "Suppliers" of 5.11.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
This question focuses on tier 1 (direct) suppliers only. 
Criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized for engagement on this environmental issue (column 2) 
Select the criteria that best describe the factors considered when prioritizing suppliers to engage with on each environmental issue. 
For example, if, following an evaluation of the climate-related risks associated with your organization's material sourcing you focus your engagement on suppliers of the materials critical to mitigate climate-related risks and promote responsible practices, select "Material sourcing" and "Business risk mitigation". 
If you indicated in 5.11.1 that you assess the dependencies and/or impacts of your suppliers: 
Select "In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers…" if you use the same criteria (as selected in column 2 of 5.11.1) to prioritize suppliers for engagement on this environmental issue (i.e., you prioritize suppliers for engagement based on their dependencies and/or impacts related to this environmental issue). 
Select "In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers…" and additional options, if you prioritize suppliers based on both their dependencies and/or impacts related to this environmental issue and other criteria. 
P lease explain (column 4) 
If you selected "Yes, we prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue" in column 1 "Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue", briefly describe your rationale for using the criteria selected in column 2 "Criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized…" to prioritize suppliers and how this relates to your engagement on this environmental issue. In addition, state whether your prioritization of supplier engagement is associated with a particular business activity, product line, regulation etc. 
If you selected "No, we do not prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue" in column 1 "Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue", provide your reasons.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: The organization prioritizes engagement with specific suppliers on environmental issues, guided by their dependencies and/or impact on the environment.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
Compliance: the state of complying with or fulfilling a given environmental requirement, standard, policy, commitment, or target. Compliance may be assessed at the level of production or primary processing unit(s) (e.g., farms, farmer groups, or mills), value chains or an entire organization commitment (adapted from AFi, 2024 ). 
Vulnerable supplier : supplier that is exposed to significant economic, environmental and/or social risks ( ESRS , 2023 ).
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate Change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue covered':
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue covered in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue covered':
i) 'Yes, we prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue' selected in column 'Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue' - 1 point
ii) 'In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to climate change' selected in column 'Criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized for engagement on this environmental issue' - 1 point
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
For rows where 'Climate Change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue covered':
'No, we do not prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue' selected in column 'Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue' AND
'We engage with all suppliers' selected in column 'Primary reason…' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue covered in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

i) 'Yes, we prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue' selected in column 'Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue' - 1 point
ii) 'In line with the criteria used to classify suppliers as having substantive dependencies and/or impacts relating to climate change' selected in column 'Criteria informing which suppliers are prioritized for engagement on this environmental issue' - 1 point
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
For rows where 'Climate Change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue covered':
'No, we do not prioritize which suppliers to engage with on this environmental issue' selected in column 'Supplier engagement prioritization on this environmental issue' AND
'We engage with all suppliers' selected in column 'Primary reason…' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue covered in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사는 환경이슈와 관련하여 인게이지먼트 할 공급업체의 우선순위를 정하여 관리하고 있습니까?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
